I don’t want to give you three needles, but I will give you the water pencil tube. It will stay in your arm so I can give you the three tubes of hurry water one every 5 minutes, and in 15 minutes it will be done.Three times I squeeze your hand to let you know I’m giving you the hurry water. We touch the fountain each time. When you feel the pencil tube that lies flat against your wrist I will help you think of other things other than bad things that happened when Chaucer was alive. I will sing the old chant songs to you.”With great difficulty you say yes and then you cry. Peace Full says, “We have a relaxing time. You just listen while I talk, and I help you through the scary times. Remember, the cream does not let you feel any needle. If there is a time when there is a needle and no cream, as there may be in the real world, know that I will talk longer and my meditation will be double because then I will talk you through pain relief images. This story is about getting a pain relief cream because I saw a written note about the cream called Emla. I want you to know the first part of the double meditation. You do not need the second one now. You need only the meditation about my name.”7. Meditation on the main character’s name:Take a deep breath in…and out…In…and out…In…out…Continue to breathe slowly and rhythmically as you now meditate to calm your mind.You can choose any phrase you want to focus upon for the meditation portion of this pain management relaxation. This will be your focus word. I’ll use the word “peaceful” here. Focus your attention on this word with each breath. Every time your thoughts drift, focus in again on this word. Don’t worry about making anything happen, or doing this meditation a certain way. Whatever happens is right for you at this moment.Keep an attitude of passive acceptance. Just accept the state you are in, and continue to focus your mind on the word you will be repeating.Breathe in…peaceBreathe out…FullIn…peaceOut…FullPeace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Continue to repeat this word in your mind, focusing your attention on this word whenever your thoughts wander.Keep repeating your focus word…(pause)When your thoughts drift, focus your attention again on your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Focus your mind again on your focus word.As thoughts enter your mind, as they will, just turn your attention back to your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Take note of how your body feels, now. See how relaxed your muscles are. Notice how calm your mind is. Enjoy this feeling of relaxation for a few moments more.8. The Wavy Lake and the castle made of clouds:(lake sound)Then Peace Full squeezes your hand to let you know there’s no more water pencil with the needle. She says, “Listen, Ball of Wings has opened a door for us. We cross some more water. What do you say?” You are very happy and say, “Oh goody.”Peace Full says, “The lake is created for those who cannot see so they can hear the water and know the entrance to the castle made of clouds. You can breathe, swim, walk, and fly in here. The waves are here to comfort you and you feel them like you felt the bubbles of the stream the last time we were in the water. If you can see you go up floating on clouds, but you can’t hear clouds so this entrance is created for you.”Having been given the protective magic water you and Peace Full jump into the lake. On the way to the castle in the clouds as you and Peace Full fly threw the water, you ask “Why are the water places are so big?” For you to get to know the peaceful person and to know that the water is safe and that the water is far away from the place where you heard the words that took away your self esteem. You are tired from the water journey and the giving of the magic water and you want to sleep so you sleep in a castle.Peace Full knows a lot of old chant songs. She sings one to you while in the water which leads into the castle of clouds. Then she leads you to a comfortable room made out of clouds, and she gives you a tall glass of water. This room is the music room, and here she shows you with a keyboard and the music notes from middle c to G that the counting from the beginning of the story is the scale c to g and then back to c.Since she does a lot of lessons because she helps people get to the castle made of clouds, Peace Full says the counting instructions for sleep to you as you lie in the cloud bed that she knows is provided for you here in the cozy castle. You say, “who is the Ball of Wings? She says, “We can’t see him or hear him, but he is with us. Touch the koosh ball now. That is our symbol for him. I have a koosh ball, and I give you this koosh ball, the one that I want you to touch.”You wonder all night about who the ball of Wings is and how he got his name. She says, “He is there with you all the time. Believe in him the way you have learned to believe in me. He sent me. Rest now. Because of your time of fears that causes you to need help with relaxing, I, Peace Full rub warm lotion into your arms and legs. Here is the lotion. Feel how good it is. It has some of the pure water from the lake in it.I watch over you when you sleep, and if you are thirsty or have a nightmare call my name. When you wake up, I am with you. I put a water bottle by your bed, but if you forget in the night to reach out for it, call my name. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

After she shows you swimming you have no more flashback, and you swim. The water in the mote sounds like a waterfall that is so big that Peace Full has to shout at you so you can hear her over the water. She asks you what you are afraid of, and you say, “I am afraid of the roaring water.” Peace Full says, “Mrs. Words, it is quieter under the water. That is why you need the mask for this water so you can breathe under it.We do not swim on the top of the water because it is the waterfall. This is where the falling dream took you, out of the dirty word place and into the big water.” The water is so loud so that it does not let you hear any words that are bad for your self image. Believing the bad names that someone else calls you is bad for your emotional health.” Because you hear her voice, you hold her hand and go under water with her, and this is how she shows you that with the mask you can breathe under water.4. Water scene: River.(River sound)The water changes for the second scene. It sounds different and you do not hear it falling on top of itself. Peace Full tells you “Mrs. Words, This is a river. you need wings for flying. May I take the mask off so that you can breathe? You gain the ability to breathe under water because there’s something in the water that lets you breathe,so you don’t need the mask. I do not have my mask either. I can breathe under the water too. You need wings here so you do not get tired because the river is very big and the water is fast. It is still a safe water, but I don‘t want you getting too tired to walk or swim in it, and flying is what takes care of that. I must help you try on your wings. I received my pair when I was with the ball of Wings who sent me.“As for the wings part, you do not understand about the wings and try to swim with your arms and legs, but Peaceful asks you, “Why do you not want to come to me?” You say, “I do not know.” She says, “does trying on a pair of wings make you think of something else?” You say yes but do not know what that is and you struggle treading water. Peaceful swims the side stroke and carries you and talks to you about two pairs of wings: “I saw in the scary scene how they held your arms and legs down.I know that reaching your arms out frightens you now. Trying on the first set of wings is like when little kids try on floaties. You reach out and the other person puts the floaty, or this first part of the wings on. You will also have wings that are on your back. You need the flexibility of 4 wings so if any waves come you can fly upside down. When you have the first pair of wings, you will reach your arms out to the sides like you are trying on a dress shirt with sleeves and buttons down the front.” Then because of her words, you are able to let her help you get four wings.6. At Hurry Water:In a little room where you dry off after being in the water, The peaceful person says to you, “I am a nurse. I have protective words that will get rid of nightmares about what happened to you in the big, big needle place and what happened when reading about the time when there were castles. I know you don’t like to hear the word needles. I have the words, but the words are in this needle attached to a tube. They protect you from stories from long ago and stories that you remember. The water is magic water and is made magic because there are words in it.The water is called hurry water. It is concentrated magic water, and if you drink too much the water would be too strong for you because it is made to be given in a hurry when you are really thirsty, too thirsty to drink regular water. The hurry water is given through a needle. This time there’s a cream and I will use it on your arm so you do not feel the needle.Peace Full says, “In Hurry Water, here is a fountain. We sit by it, and we put our feet in it while we talk. It is too shallow to swim in. Keep your feet in the water while I tell you more about how the hurrying liquid works. The reason it’s too strong if you drink it from a cup is it would be like trying to drink a gallon of regular water all at once. This water is special because it fills up your whole body and when you feel it, it feels warm. It is relaxing water, but it fills up your cells, and it gets there the fastest when it goes into your veins. Scary thing, oh I said a scary word. I am sorry because a scary story makes you not want the magic water.“You say to Peace Full, “I heard somewhere that there are needles without cream. What happens then.” she says, “You will ask if there is anyone there who knows how to help you relax and if they could hold your hand. Do not be afraid and think about that day. For now I give you cream and the protective words that take away your worries. The strange thing is they are hidden in an object that you worry about. I don’t know why the words have to be like this, but after the ccream we will go to the castle in the clouds to sleep, and there you will drink water.”You become very scared and you can’t say any words but can only cry. Peace Full says, “We will go to the bed now, and I will show you how to get over this fear. I want the hurry water needle to be over for you soon. I’ll call it a water pencil. It doesn’t work like regular water because that would be like trying to pour water through a straw. Because you are small I will give it to you three times, this hurry water. I don’t want to give you three needles, but I will give you the water pencil tube. It will stay in your arm so I can give you the three tubes of hurry water one every 5 minutes, and in 15 minutes it will be done.Three times I squeeze your hand to let you know I’m giving you the hurry water. We touch the fountain each time. When you feel the pencil tube that lies flat against your wrist I will help you think of other things other than bad things that happened when Chaucer was alive. I will sing the old chant songs to you.”With great difficulty you say yes and then you cry. Peace Full says, “We have a relaxing time. You just listen while I talk, and I help you through the scary times. Remember, the cream does not let you feel any needle. If there is a time when there is a needle and no cream, as there may be in the real world, know that I will talk longer and my meditation will be double because then I will talk you through pain relief images. This story is about getting a pain relief cream because I saw a written note about the cream called Emla. I want you to know the first part of the double meditation. You do not need the second one now. You need only the meditation about my name.”7. This water is special because it fills up your whole body and when you feel it, it feels warm. It is relaxing water, but it fills up your cells, and it gets there the fastest when it goes into your veins. Scary thing, oh I said a scary word. I am sorry because a scary story makes you not want the magic water.“You say to Peace Full, “I heard somewhere that there are needles without cream. What happens then.” she says, “You will ask if there is anyone there who knows how to help you relax and if they could hold your hand. Do not be afraid and think about that day. For now I give you cream and the protective words that take away your worries. The strange thing is they are hidden in an object that you worry about. I don’t know why the words have to be like this, but after the ccream we will go to the castle in the clouds to sleep, and there you will drink water.”You become very scared and you can’t say any words but can only cry. Peace Full says, “We will go to the bed now, and I will show you how to get over this fear. I want the hurry water needle to be over for you soon. I’ll call it a water pencil. It doesn’t work like regular water because that would be like trying to pour water through a straw. Because you are small I will give it to you three times, this hurry water. I don’t want to give you three needles, but I will give you the water pencil tube. It will stay in your arm so I can give you the three tubes of hurry water one every 5 minutes, and in 15 minutes it will be done.Three times I squeeze your hand to let you know I’m giving you the hurry water. We touch the fountain each time. When you feel the pencil tube that lies flat against your wrist I will help you think of other things other than bad things that happened when Chaucer was alive. I will sing the old chant songs to you.”With great difficulty you say yes and then you cry. Peace Full says, “We have a relaxing time. You just listen while I talk, and I help you through the scary times. Remember, the cream does not let you feel any needle. If there is a time when there is a needle and no cream, as there may be in the real world, know that I will talk longer and my meditation will be double because then I will talk you through pain relief images. This story is about getting a pain relief cream because I saw a written note about the cream called Emla. I want you to know the first part of the double meditation. You do not need the second one now. You need only the meditation about my name.”7. Meditation on the main character’s name:Take a deep breath in…and out…In…and out…In…out…Continue to breathe slowly and rhythmically as you now meditate to calm your mind.You can choose any phrase you want to focus upon for the meditation portion of this pain management relaxation. This will be your focus word. I’ll use the word “peaceful” here. Focus your attention on this word with each breath. Every time your thoughts drift, focus in again on this word. Don’t worry about making anything happen, or doing this meditation a certain way. Whatever happens is right for you at this moment.Keep an attitude of passive acceptance. Just accept the state you are in, and continue to focus your mind on the word you will be repeating.Breathe in…peaceBreathe out…FullIn…peaceOut…FullPeace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Continue to repeat this word in your mind, focusing your attention on this word whenever your thoughts wander.Keep repeating your focus word…(pause)When your thoughts drift, focus your attention again on your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Focus your mind again on your focus word.As thoughts enter your mind, as they will, just turn your attention back to your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Take note of how your body feels, now. See how relaxed your muscles are. Notice how calm your mind is. Enjoy this feeling of relaxation for a few moments more.8. The Wavy Lake and the castle made of clouds:(lake sound)Then Peace Full squeezes your hand to let you know there’s no more water pencil with the needle. She says, “Listen, Ball of Wings has opened a door for us. We cross some more water. What do you say?” You are very happy and say, “Oh goody.”Peace Full says, “The lake is created for those who cannot see so they can hear the water and know the entrance to the castle made of clouds. You can breathe, swim, walk, and fly in here. The waves are here to comfort you and you feel them like you felt the bubbles of the stream the last time we were in the water. If you can see you go up floating on clouds, but you can’t hear clouds so this entrance is created for you.”Having been given the protective magic water you and Peace Full jump into the lake. On the way to the castle in the clouds as you and Peace Full fly threw the water, you ask “Why are the water places are so big?” For you to get to know the peaceful person and to know that the water is safe and that the water is far away from the place where you heard the words that took away your self esteem. You are tired from the water journey and the giving of the magic water and you want to sleep so you sleep in a castle.Peace Full knows a lot of old chant songs. She sings one to you while in the water which leads into the castle of clouds. Then she leads you to a comfortable room made out of clouds, and she gives you a tall glass of water. This room is the music room, and here she shows you with a keyboard and the music notes from middle c to G that the counting from the beginning of the story is the scale c to g and then back to c.Since she does a lot of lessons because she helps people get to the castle made of clouds, Peace Full says the counting instructions for sleep to you as you lie in the cloud bed that she knows is provided for you here in the cozy castle. You say, “who is the Ball of Wings? She says, “We can’t see him or hear him, but he is with us. Touch the koosh ball now. That is our symbol for him. I have a koosh ball, and I give you this koosh ball, the one that I want you to touch.”You wonder all night about who the ball of Wings is and how he got his name. She says, “He is there with you all the time. Believe in him the way you have learned to believe in me. He sent me. Rest now. Because of your time of fears that causes you to need help with relaxing, I, Peace Full rub warm lotion into your arms and legs. Here is the lotion. Feel how good it is. It has some of the pure water from the lake in it.I watch over you when you sleep, and if you are thirsty or have a nightmare call my name. When you wake up, I am with you. I put a water bottle by your bed, but if you forget in the night to reach out for it, call my name. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

4. Water scene: River.(River sound)The water changes for the second scene. It sounds different and you do not hear it falling on top of itself. Peace Full tells you “Mrs. Words, This is a river. you need wings for flying. May I take the mask off so that you can breathe? You gain the ability to breathe under water because there’s something in the water that lets you breathe,so you don’t need the mask. I do not have my mask either. I can breathe under the water too. You need wings here so you do not get tired because the river is very big and the water is fast. It is still a safe water, but I don‘t want you getting too tired to walk or swim in it, and flying is what takes care of that. I must help you try on your wings. I received my pair when I was with the ball of Wings who sent me.“As for the wings part, you do not understand about the wings and try to swim with your arms and legs, but Peaceful asks you, “Why do you not want to come to me?” You say, “I do not know.” She says, “does trying on a pair of wings make you think of something else?” You say yes but do not know what that is and you struggle treading water. Peaceful swims the side stroke and carries you and talks to you about two pairs of wings: “I saw in the scary scene how they held your arms and legs down.I know that reaching your arms out frightens you now. Trying on the first set of wings is like when little kids try on floaties. You reach out and the other person puts the floaty, or this first part of the wings on. You will also have wings that are on your back. You need the flexibility of 4 wings so if any waves come you can fly upside down. When you have the first pair of wings, you will reach your arms out to the sides like you are trying on a dress shirt with sleeves and buttons down the front.” Then because of her words, you are able to let her help you get four wings.6. At Hurry Water:In a little room where you dry off after being in the water, The peaceful person says to you, “I am a nurse. I have protective words that will get rid of nightmares about what happened to you in the big, big needle place and what happened when reading about the time when there were castles. I know you don’t like to hear the word needles. I have the words, but the words are in this needle attached to a tube. They protect you from stories from long ago and stories that you remember. The water is magic water and is made magic because there are words in it.The water is called hurry water. It is concentrated magic water, and if you drink too much the water would be too strong for you because it is made to be given in a hurry when you are really thirsty, too thirsty to drink regular water. The hurry water is given through a needle. This time there’s a cream and I will use it on your arm so you do not feel the needle.Peace Full says, “In Hurry Water, here is a fountain. We sit by it, and we put our feet in it while we talk. It is too shallow to swim in. Keep your feet in the water while I tell you more about how the hurrying liquid works. The reason it’s too strong if you drink it from a cup is it would be like trying to drink a gallon of regular water all at once. This water is special because it fills up your whole body and when you feel it, it feels warm. It is relaxing water, but it fills up your cells, and it gets there the fastest when it goes into your veins. Scary thing, oh I said a scary word. I am sorry because a scary story makes you not want the magic water.“You say to Peace Full, “I heard somewhere that there are needles without cream. What happens then.” she says, “You will ask if there is anyone there who knows how to help you relax and if they could hold your hand. Do not be afraid and think about that day. For now I give you cream and the protective words that take away your worries. The strange thing is they are hidden in an object that you worry about. I don’t know why the words have to be like this, but after the ccream we will go to the castle in the clouds to sleep, and there you will drink water.”You become very scared and you can’t say any words but can only cry. Peace Full says, “We will go to the bed now, and I will show you how to get over this fear. I want the hurry water needle to be over for you soon. I’ll call it a water pencil. It doesn’t work like regular water because that would be like trying to pour water through a straw. Because you are small I will give it to you three times, this hurry water. I don’t want to give you three needles, but I will give you the water pencil tube. It will stay in your arm so I can give you the three tubes of hurry water one every 5 minutes, and in 15 minutes it will be done.Three times I squeeze your hand to let you know I’m giving you the hurry water. We touch the fountain each time. When you feel the pencil tube that lies flat against your wrist I will help you think of other things other than bad things that happened when Chaucer was alive. I will sing the old chant songs to you.”With great difficulty you say yes and then you cry. Peace Full says, “We have a relaxing time. You just listen while I talk, and I help you through the scary times. Remember, the cream does not let you feel any needle. If there is a time when there is a needle and no cream, as there may be in the real world, know that I will talk longer and my meditation will be double because then I will talk you through pain relief images. This story is about getting a pain relief cream because I saw a written note about the cream called Emla. I want you to know the first part of the double meditation. You do not need the second one now. You need only the meditation about my name.”7. This will be your focus word. I’ll use the word “peaceful” here. Focus your attention on this word with each breath. Every time your thoughts drift, focus in again on this word. For now I give you cream and the protective words that take away your worries. The strange thing is they are hidden in an object that you worry about. I don’t know why the words have to be like this, but after the ccream we will go to the castle in the clouds to sleep, and there you will drink water.”You become very scared and you can’t say any words but can only cry. Peace Full says, “We will go to the bed now, and I will show you how to get over this fear. I want the hurry water needle to be over for you soon. I’ll call it a water pencil. It doesn’t work like regular water because that would be like trying to pour water through a straw. Because you are small I will give it to you three times, this hurry water. I don’t want to give you three needles, but I will give you the water pencil tube. It will stay in your arm so I can give you the three tubes of hurry water one every 5 minutes, and in 15 minutes it will be done.Three times I squeeze your hand to let you know I’m giving you the hurry water. We touch the fountain each time. When you feel the pencil tube that lies flat against your wrist I will help you think of other things other than bad things that happened when Chaucer was alive. I will sing the old chant songs to you.”With great difficulty you say yes and then you cry. Peace Full says, “We have a relaxing time. You just listen while I talk, and I help you through the scary times. Remember, the cream does not let you feel any needle. If there is a time when there is a needle and no cream, as there may be in the real world, know that I will talk longer and my meditation will be double because then I will talk you through pain relief images. This story is about getting a pain relief cream because I saw a written note about the cream called Emla. I want you to know the first part of the double meditation. You do not need the second one now. You need only the meditation about my name.”7. Meditation on the main character’s name:Take a deep breath in…and out…In…and out…In…out…Continue to breathe slowly and rhythmically as you now meditate to calm your mind.You can choose any phrase you want to focus upon for the meditation portion of this pain management relaxation. This will be your focus word. I’ll use the word “peaceful” here. Focus your attention on this word with each breath. Every time your thoughts drift, focus in again on this word. Don’t worry about making anything happen, or doing this meditation a certain way. Whatever happens is right for you at this moment.Keep an attitude of passive acceptance. Just accept the state you are in, and continue to focus your mind on the word you will be repeating.Breathe in…peaceBreathe out…FullIn…peaceOut…FullPeace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Continue to repeat this word in your mind, focusing your attention on this word whenever your thoughts wander.Keep repeating your focus word…(pause)When your thoughts drift, focus your attention again on your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Focus your mind again on your focus word.As thoughts enter your mind, as they will, just turn your attention back to your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Take note of how your body feels, now. See how relaxed your muscles are. Notice how calm your mind is. Enjoy this feeling of relaxation for a few moments more.8. The Wavy Lake and the castle made of clouds:(lake sound)Then Peace Full squeezes your hand to let you know there’s no more water pencil with the needle. She says, “Listen, Ball of Wings has opened a door for us. We cross some more water. What do you say?” You are very happy and say, “Oh goody.”Peace Full says, “The lake is created for those who cannot see so they can hear the water and know the entrance to the castle made of clouds. You can breathe, swim, walk, and fly in here. The waves are here to comfort you and you feel them like you felt the bubbles of the stream the last time we were in the water. If you can see you go up floating on clouds, but you can’t hear clouds so this entrance is created for you.”Having been given the protective magic water you and Peace Full jump into the lake. On the way to the castle in the clouds as you and Peace Full fly threw the water, you ask “Why are the water places are so big?” For you to get to know the peaceful person and to know that the water is safe and that the water is far away from the place where you heard the words that took away your self esteem. You are tired from the water journey and the giving of the magic water and you want to sleep so you sleep in a castle.Peace Full knows a lot of old chant songs. She sings one to you while in the water which leads into the castle of clouds. Then she leads you to a comfortable room made out of clouds, and she gives you a tall glass of water. This room is the music room, and here she shows you with a keyboard and the music notes from middle c to G that the counting from the beginning of the story is the scale c to g and then back to c.Since she does a lot of lessons because she helps people get to the castle made of clouds, Peace Full says the counting instructions for sleep to you as you lie in the cloud bed that she knows is provided for you here in the cozy castle. You say, “who is the Ball of Wings? She says, “We can’t see him or hear him, but he is with us. Touch the koosh ball now. That is our symbol for him. I have a koosh ball, and I give you this koosh ball, the one that I want you to touch.”You wonder all night about who the ball of Wings is and how he got his name. She says, “He is there with you all the time. Believe in him the way you have learned to believe in me. He sent me. Rest now. Because of your time of fears that causes you to need help with relaxing, I, Peace Full rub warm lotion into your arms and legs. Here is the lotion. Feel how good it is. It has some of the pure water from the lake in it.I watch over you when you sleep, and if you are thirsty or have a nightmare call my name. When you wake up, I am with you. I put a water bottle by your bed, but if you forget in the night to reach out for it, call my name. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

The water changes for the second scene. It sounds different and you do not hear it falling on top of itself. Peace Full tells you “Mrs. Words, This is a river. you need wings for flying. May I take the mask off so that you can breathe? You gain the ability to breathe under water because there’s something in the water that lets you breathe,so you don’t need the mask. I do not have my mask either. I can breathe under the water too. You need wings here so you do not get tired because the river is very big and the water is fast. It is still a safe water, but I don‘t want you getting too tired to walk or swim in it, and flying is what takes care of that. I must help you try on your wings. I received my pair when I was with the ball of Wings who sent me.“As for the wings part, you do not understand about the wings and try to swim with your arms and legs, but Peaceful asks you, “Why do you not want to come to me?” You say, “I do not know.” She says, “does trying on a pair of wings make you think of something else?” You say yes but do not know what that is and you struggle treading water. Peaceful swims the side stroke and carries you and talks to you about two pairs of wings: “I saw in the scary scene how they held your arms and legs down.I know that reaching your arms out frightens you now. Trying on the first set of wings is like when little kids try on floaties. You reach out and the other person puts the floaty, or this first part of the wings on. You will also have wings that are on your back. You need the flexibility of 4 wings so if any waves come you can fly upside down. When you have the first pair of wings, you will reach your arms out to the sides like you are trying on a dress shirt with sleeves and buttons down the front.” Then because of her words, you are able to let her help you get four wings.6. At Hurry Water:In a little room where you dry off after being in the water, The peaceful person says to you, “I am a nurse. I have protective words that will get rid of nightmares about what happened to you in the big, big needle place and what happened when reading about the time when there were castles. I know you don’t like to hear the word needles. I have the words, but the words are in this needle attached to a tube. They protect you from stories from long ago and stories that you remember. The water is magic water and is made magic because there are words in it.The water is called hurry water. It is concentrated magic water, and if you drink too much the water would be too strong for you because it is made to be given in a hurry when you are really thirsty, too thirsty to drink regular water. The hurry water is given through a needle. This time there’s a cream and I will use it on your arm so you do not feel the needle.Peace Full says, “In Hurry Water, here is a fountain. We sit by it, and we put our feet in it while we talk. It is too shallow to swim in. Keep your feet in the water while I tell you more about how the hurrying liquid works. The reason it’s too strong if you drink it from a cup is it would be like trying to drink a gallon of regular water all at once. This water is special because it fills up your whole body and when you feel it, it feels warm. It is relaxing water, but it fills up your cells, and it gets there the fastest when it goes into your veins. Scary thing, oh I said a scary word. I am sorry because a scary story makes you not want the magic water.“You say to Peace Full, “I heard somewhere that there are needles without cream. What happens then.” she says, “You will ask if there is anyone there who knows how to help you relax and if they could hold your hand. Do not be afraid and think about that day. For now I give you cream and the protective words that take away your worries. The strange thing is they are hidden in an object that you worry about. I don’t know why the words have to be like this, but after the ccream we will go to the castle in the clouds to sleep, and there you will drink water.”You become very scared and you can’t say any words but can only cry. Peace Full says, “We will go to the bed now, and I will show you how to get over this fear. I want the hurry water needle to be over for you soon. I’ll call it a water pencil. It doesn’t work like regular water because that would be like trying to pour water through a straw. Because you are small I will give it to you three times, this hurry water. I don’t want to give you three needles, but I will give you the water pencil tube. It will stay in your arm so I can give you the three tubes of hurry water one every 5 minutes, and in 15 minutes it will be done.Three times I squeeze your hand to let you know I’m giving you the hurry water. We touch the fountain each time. When you feel the pencil tube that lies flat against your wrist I will help you think of other things other than bad things that happened when Chaucer was alive. I will sing the old chant songs to you.”With great difficulty you say yes and then you cry. Peace Full says, “We have a relaxing time. You just listen while I talk, and I help you through the scary times. Remember, the cream does not let you feel any needle. If there is a time when there is a needle and no cream, as there may be in the real world, know that I will talk longer and my meditation will be double because then I will talk you through pain relief images. This story is about getting a pain relief cream because I saw a written note about the cream called Emla. I want you to know the first part of the double meditation. You do not need the second one now. You need only the meditation about my name.”7. As for the wings part, you do not understand about the wings and try to swim with your arms and legs, but Peaceful asks you, “Why do you not want to come to me?” You say, “I do not know.” She says, “does trying on a pair of wings make you think of something else?” You say yes but do not know what that is and you struggle treading water. If there is a time when there is a needle and no cream, as there may be in the real world, know that I will talk longer and my meditation will be double because then I will talk you through pain relief images. This story is about getting a pain relief cream because I saw a written note about the cream called Emla. I want you to know the first part of the double meditation. You do not need the second one now. You need only the meditation about my name.”7. Meditation on the main character’s name:Take a deep breath in…and out…In…and out…In…out…Continue to breathe slowly and rhythmically as you now meditate to calm your mind.You can choose any phrase you want to focus upon for the meditation portion of this pain management relaxation. This will be your focus word. I’ll use the word “peaceful” here. Focus your attention on this word with each breath. Every time your thoughts drift, focus in again on this word. Don’t worry about making anything happen, or doing this meditation a certain way. Whatever happens is right for you at this moment.Keep an attitude of passive acceptance. Just accept the state you are in, and continue to focus your mind on the word you will be repeating.Breathe in…peaceBreathe out…FullIn…peaceOut…FullPeace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Continue to repeat this word in your mind, focusing your attention on this word whenever your thoughts wander.Keep repeating your focus word…(pause)When your thoughts drift, focus your attention again on your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Focus your mind again on your focus word.As thoughts enter your mind, as they will, just turn your attention back to your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Take note of how your body feels, now. See how relaxed your muscles are. Notice how calm your mind is. Enjoy this feeling of relaxation for a few moments more.8. The Wavy Lake and the castle made of clouds:(lake sound)Then Peace Full squeezes your hand to let you know there’s no more water pencil with the needle. She says, “Listen, Ball of Wings has opened a door for us. We cross some more water. What do you say?” You are very happy and say, “Oh goody.”Peace Full says, “The lake is created for those who cannot see so they can hear the water and know the entrance to the castle made of clouds. You can breathe, swim, walk, and fly in here. The waves are here to comfort you and you feel them like you felt the bubbles of the stream the last time we were in the water. If you can see you go up floating on clouds, but you can’t hear clouds so this entrance is created for you.”Having been given the protective magic water you and Peace Full jump into the lake. On the way to the castle in the clouds as you and Peace Full fly threw the water, you ask “Why are the water places are so big?” For you to get to know the peaceful person and to know that the water is safe and that the water is far away from the place where you heard the words that took away your self esteem. You are tired from the water journey and the giving of the magic water and you want to sleep so you sleep in a castle.Peace Full knows a lot of old chant songs. She sings one to you while in the water which leads into the castle of clouds. Then she leads you to a comfortable room made out of clouds, and she gives you a tall glass of water. This room is the music room, and here she shows you with a keyboard and the music notes from middle c to G that the counting from the beginning of the story is the scale c to g and then back to c.Since she does a lot of lessons because she helps people get to the castle made of clouds, Peace Full says the counting instructions for sleep to you as you lie in the cloud bed that she knows is provided for you here in the cozy castle. You say, “who is the Ball of Wings? She says, “We can’t see him or hear him, but he is with us. Touch the koosh ball now. That is our symbol for him. I have a koosh ball, and I give you this koosh ball, the one that I want you to touch.”You wonder all night about who the ball of Wings is and how he got his name. She says, “He is there with you all the time. Believe in him the way you have learned to believe in me. He sent me. Rest now. Because of your time of fears that causes you to need help with relaxing, I, Peace Full rub warm lotion into your arms and legs. Here is the lotion. Feel how good it is. It has some of the pure water from the lake in it.I watch over you when you sleep, and if you are thirsty or have a nightmare call my name. When you wake up, I am with you. I put a water bottle by your bed, but if you forget in the night to reach out for it, call my name. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

I know that reaching your arms out frightens you now. Trying on the first set of wings is like when little kids try on floaties. You reach out and the other person puts the floaty, or this first part of the wings on. You will also have wings that are on your back. You need the flexibility of 4 wings so if any waves come you can fly upside down. When you have the first pair of wings, you will reach your arms out to the sides like you are trying on a dress shirt with sleeves and buttons down the front.” Then because of her words, you are able to let her help you get four wings.6. At Hurry Water:In a little room where you dry off after being in the water, The peaceful person says to you, “I am a nurse. I have protective words that will get rid of nightmares about what happened to you in the big, big needle place and what happened when reading about the time when there were castles. I know you don’t like to hear the word needles. I have the words, but the words are in this needle attached to a tube. They protect you from stories from long ago and stories that you remember. The water is magic water and is made magic because there are words in it.The water is called hurry water. It is concentrated magic water, and if you drink too much the water would be too strong for you because it is made to be given in a hurry when you are really thirsty, too thirsty to drink regular water. The hurry water is given through a needle. This time there’s a cream and I will use it on your arm so you do not feel the needle.Peace Full says, “In Hurry Water, here is a fountain. We sit by it, and we put our feet in it while we talk. It is too shallow to swim in. Keep your feet in the water while I tell you more about how the hurrying liquid works. The reason it’s too strong if you drink it from a cup is it would be like trying to drink a gallon of regular water all at once. This water is special because it fills up your whole body and when you feel it, it feels warm. It is relaxing water, but it fills up your cells, and it gets there the fastest when it goes into your veins. Scary thing, oh I said a scary word. I am sorry because a scary story makes you not want the magic water.“You say to Peace Full, “I heard somewhere that there are needles without cream. What happens then.” she says, “You will ask if there is anyone there who knows how to help you relax and if they could hold your hand. Do not be afraid and think about that day. For now I give you cream and the protective words that take away your worries. The strange thing is they are hidden in an object that you worry about. I don’t know why the words have to be like this, but after the ccream we will go to the castle in the clouds to sleep, and there you will drink water.”You become very scared and you can’t say any words but can only cry. Peace Full says, “We will go to the bed now, and I will show you how to get over this fear. I want the hurry water needle to be over for you soon. I’ll call it a water pencil. It doesn’t work like regular water because that would be like trying to pour water through a straw. Because you are small I will give it to you three times, this hurry water. I don’t want to give you three needles, but I will give you the water pencil tube. It will stay in your arm so I can give you the three tubes of hurry water one every 5 minutes, and in 15 minutes it will be done.Three times I squeeze your hand to let you know I’m giving you the hurry water. We touch the fountain each time. When you feel the pencil tube that lies flat against your wrist I will help you think of other things other than bad things that happened when Chaucer was alive. I will sing the old chant songs to you.”With great difficulty you say yes and then you cry. Peace Full says, “We have a relaxing time. You just listen while I talk, and I help you through the scary times. Remember, the cream does not let you feel any needle. If there is a time when there is a needle and no cream, as there may be in the real world, know that I will talk longer and my meditation will be double because then I will talk you through pain relief images. This story is about getting a pain relief cream because I saw a written note about the cream called Emla. I want you to know the first part of the double meditation. You do not need the second one now. You need only the meditation about my name.”7. This will be your focus word. I’ll use the word “peaceful” here. Focus your attention on this word with each breath. Every time your thoughts drift, focus in again on this word. Don’t worry about making anything happen, or doing this meditation a certain way. Whatever happens is right for you at this moment.Keep an attitude of passive acceptance. I put a water bottle by your bed, but if you forget in the night to reach out for it, call my name. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

6. At Hurry Water:In a little room where you dry off after being in the water, The peaceful person says to you, “I am a nurse. I have protective words that will get rid of nightmares about what happened to you in the big, big needle place and what happened when reading about the time when there were castles. I know you don’t like to hear the word needles. I have the words, but the words are in this needle attached to a tube. They protect you from stories from long ago and stories that you remember. The water is magic water and is made magic because there are words in it.The water is called hurry water. It is concentrated magic water, and if you drink too much the water would be too strong for you because it is made to be given in a hurry when you are really thirsty, too thirsty to drink regular water. The hurry water is given through a needle. This time there’s a cream and I will use it on your arm so you do not feel the needle.Peace Full says, “In Hurry Water, here is a fountain. We sit by it, and we put our feet in it while we talk. It is too shallow to swim in. Keep your feet in the water while I tell you more about how the hurrying liquid works. The reason it’s too strong if you drink it from a cup is it would be like trying to drink a gallon of regular water all at once. This water is special because it fills up your whole body and when you feel it, it feels warm. It is relaxing water, but it fills up your cells, and it gets there the fastest when it goes into your veins. Scary thing, oh I said a scary word. I am sorry because a scary story makes you not want the magic water.“You say to Peace Full, “I heard somewhere that there are needles without cream. What happens then.” she says, “You will ask if there is anyone there who knows how to help you relax and if they could hold your hand. Do not be afraid and think about that day. For now I give you cream and the protective words that take away your worries. The strange thing is they are hidden in an object that you worry about. I don’t know why the words have to be like this, but after the ccream we will go to the castle in the clouds to sleep, and there you will drink water.”You become very scared and you can’t say any words but can only cry. Peace Full says, “We will go to the bed now, and I will show you how to get over this fear. I want the hurry water needle to be over for you soon. I’ll call it a water pencil. It doesn’t work like regular water because that would be like trying to pour water through a straw. Because you are small I will give it to you three times, this hurry water. I don’t want to give you three needles, but I will give you the water pencil tube. It will stay in your arm so I can give you the three tubes of hurry water one every 5 minutes, and in 15 minutes it will be done.Three times I squeeze your hand to let you know I’m giving you the hurry water. We touch the fountain each time. When you feel the pencil tube that lies flat against your wrist I will help you think of other things other than bad things that happened when Chaucer was alive. I will sing the old chant songs to you.”With great difficulty you say yes and then you cry. Peace Full says, “We have a relaxing time. You just listen while I talk, and I help you through the scary times. Remember, the cream does not let you feel any needle. If there is a time when there is a needle and no cream, as there may be in the real world, know that I will talk longer and my meditation will be double because then I will talk you through pain relief images. This story is about getting a pain relief cream because I saw a written note about the cream called Emla. I want you to know the first part of the double meditation. You do not need the second one now. You need only the meditation about my name.”7. Meditation on the main character’s name:Take a deep breath in…and out…In…and out…In…out…Continue to breathe slowly and rhythmically as you now meditate to calm your mind.You can choose any phrase you want to focus upon for the meditation portion of this pain management relaxation. This will be your focus word. I’ll use the word “peaceful” here. Focus your attention on this word with each breath. Every time your thoughts drift, focus in again on this word. Don’t worry about making anything happen, or doing this meditation a certain way. Whatever happens is right for you at this moment.Keep an attitude of passive acceptance. Just accept the state you are in, and continue to focus your mind on the word you will be repeating.Breathe in…peaceBreathe out…FullIn…peaceOut…FullPeace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Continue to repeat this word in your mind, focusing your attention on this word whenever your thoughts wander.Keep repeating your focus word…(pause)When your thoughts drift, focus your attention again on your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Focus your mind again on your focus word.As thoughts enter your mind, as they will, just turn your attention back to your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Take note of how your body feels, now. See how relaxed your muscles are. Notice how calm your mind is. Enjoy this feeling of relaxation for a few moments more.8. The Wavy Lake and the castle made of clouds:(lake sound)Then Peace Full squeezes your hand to let you know there’s no more water pencil with the needle. She says, “Listen, Ball of Wings has opened a door for us. We cross some more water. What do you say?” You are very happy and say, “Oh goody.”Peace Full says, “The lake is created for those who cannot see so they can hear the water and know the entrance to the castle made of clouds. You can breathe, swim, walk, and fly in here. The waves are here to comfort you and you feel them like you felt the bubbles of the stream the last time we were in the water. If you can see you go up floating on clouds, but you can’t hear clouds so this entrance is created for you.”Having been given the protective magic water you and Peace Full jump into the lake. On the way to the castle in the clouds as you and Peace Full fly threw the water, you ask “Why are the water places are so big?” For you to get to know the peaceful person and to know that the water is safe and that the water is far away from the place where you heard the words that took away your self esteem. You are tired from the water journey and the giving of the magic water and you want to sleep so you sleep in a castle.Peace Full knows a lot of old chant songs. She sings one to you while in the water which leads into the castle of clouds. Then she leads you to a comfortable room made out of clouds, and she gives you a tall glass of water. This room is the music room, and here she shows you with a keyboard and the music notes from middle c to G that the counting from the beginning of the story is the scale c to g and then back to c.Since she does a lot of lessons because she helps people get to the castle made of clouds, Peace Full says the counting instructions for sleep to you as you lie in the cloud bed that she knows is provided for you here in the cozy castle. You say, “who is the Ball of Wings? She says, “We can’t see him or hear him, but he is with us. Touch the koosh ball now. That is our symbol for him. I have a koosh ball, and I give you this koosh ball, the one that I want you to touch.”You wonder all night about who the ball of Wings is and how he got his name. She says, “He is there with you all the time. Believe in him the way you have learned to believe in me. He sent me. Rest now. Because of your time of fears that causes you to need help with relaxing, I, Peace Full rub warm lotion into your arms and legs. Here is the lotion. Feel how good it is. It has some of the pure water from the lake in it.I watch over you when you sleep, and if you are thirsty or have a nightmare call my name. When you wake up, I am with you. I put a water bottle by your bed, but if you forget in the night to reach out for it, call my name. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

The water is magic water and is made magic because there are words in it.

The water is called hurry water. You say, “who is the Ball of Wings? She says, “We can’t see him or hear him, but he is with us. Touch the koosh ball now. That is our symbol for him. I have a koosh ball, and I give you this koosh ball, the one that I want you to touch.”You wonder all night about who the ball of Wings is and how he got his name. She says, “He is there with you all the time. Believe in him the way you have learned to believe in me. He sent me. Rest now. Because of your time of fears that causes you to need help with relaxing, I, Peace Full rub warm lotion into your arms and legs. Here is the lotion. Feel how good it is. It has some of the pure water from the lake in it.I watch over you when you sleep, and if you are thirsty or have a nightmare call my name. When you wake up, I am with you. I put a water bottle by your bed, but if you forget in the night to reach out for it, call my name. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

Peace Full says, “In Hurry Water, here is a fountain. We sit by it, and we put our feet in it while we talk. It is too shallow to swim in. Keep your feet in the water while I tell you more about how the hurrying liquid works. The reason it’s too strong if you drink it from a cup is it would be like trying to drink a gallon of regular water all at once. This water is special because it fills up your whole body and when you feel it, it feels warm. It is relaxing water, but it fills up your cells, and it gets there the fastest when it goes into your veins. Scary thing, oh I said a scary word. I am sorry because a scary story makes you not want the magic water.“You say to Peace Full, “I heard somewhere that there are needles without cream. What happens then.” she says, “You will ask if there is anyone there who knows how to help you relax and if they could hold your hand. Do not be afraid and think about that day. For now I give you cream and the protective words that take away your worries. The strange thing is they are hidden in an object that you worry about. I don’t know why the words have to be like this, but after the ccream we will go to the castle in the clouds to sleep, and there you will drink water.”You become very scared and you can’t say any words but can only cry. Peace Full says, “We will go to the bed now, and I will show you how to get over this fear. I want the hurry water needle to be over for you soon. I’ll call it a water pencil. It doesn’t work like regular water because that would be like trying to pour water through a straw. Because you are small I will give it to you three times, this hurry water. I don’t want to give you three needles, but I will give you the water pencil tube. It will stay in your arm so I can give you the three tubes of hurry water one every 5 minutes, and in 15 minutes it will be done.Three times I squeeze your hand to let you know I’m giving you the hurry water. We touch the fountain each time. When you feel the pencil tube that lies flat against your wrist I will help you think of other things other than bad things that happened when Chaucer was alive. I will sing the old chant songs to you.”With great difficulty you say yes and then you cry. Peace Full says, “We have a relaxing time. You just listen while I talk, and I help you through the scary times. Remember, the cream does not let you feel any needle. If there is a time when there is a needle and no cream, as there may be in the real world, know that I will talk longer and my meditation will be double because then I will talk you through pain relief images. This story is about getting a pain relief cream because I saw a written note about the cream called Emla. I want you to know the first part of the double meditation. You do not need the second one now. You need only the meditation about my name.”7. Meditation on the main character’s name:Take a deep breath in…and out…In…and out…In…out…Continue to breathe slowly and rhythmically as you now meditate to calm your mind.You can choose any phrase you want to focus upon for the meditation portion of this pain management relaxation. This will be your focus word. I’ll use the word “peaceful” here. Focus your attention on this word with each breath. Every time your thoughts drift, focus in again on this word. Don’t worry about making anything happen, or doing this meditation a certain way. Whatever happens is right for you at this moment.Keep an attitude of passive acceptance. Just accept the state you are in, and continue to focus your mind on the word you will be repeating.Breathe in…peaceBreathe out…FullIn…peaceOut…FullPeace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Continue to repeat this word in your mind, focusing your attention on this word whenever your thoughts wander.Keep repeating your focus word…(pause)When your thoughts drift, focus your attention again on your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Focus your mind again on your focus word.As thoughts enter your mind, as they will, just turn your attention back to your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Take note of how your body feels, now. See how relaxed your muscles are. Notice how calm your mind is. Enjoy this feeling of relaxation for a few moments more.8. The Wavy Lake and the castle made of clouds:(lake sound)Then Peace Full squeezes your hand to let you know there’s no more water pencil with the needle. She says, “Listen, Ball of Wings has opened a door for us. We cross some more water. What do you say?” You are very happy and say, “Oh goody.”Peace Full says, “The lake is created for those who cannot see so they can hear the water and know the entrance to the castle made of clouds. You can breathe, swim, walk, and fly in here. The waves are here to comfort you and you feel them like you felt the bubbles of the stream the last time we were in the water. If you can see you go up floating on clouds, but you can’t hear clouds so this entrance is created for you.”Having been given the protective magic water you and Peace Full jump into the lake. On the way to the castle in the clouds as you and Peace Full fly threw the water, you ask “Why are the water places are so big?” For you to get to know the peaceful person and to know that the water is safe and that the water is far away from the place where you heard the words that took away your self esteem. You are tired from the water journey and the giving of the magic water and you want to sleep so you sleep in a castle.Peace Full knows a lot of old chant songs. She sings one to you while in the water which leads into the castle of clouds. Then she leads you to a comfortable room made out of clouds, and she gives you a tall glass of water. This room is the music room, and here she shows you with a keyboard and the music notes from middle c to G that the counting from the beginning of the story is the scale c to g and then back to c.Since she does a lot of lessons because she helps people get to the castle made of clouds, Peace Full says the counting instructions for sleep to you as you lie in the cloud bed that she knows is provided for you here in the cozy castle. You say, “who is the Ball of Wings? She says, “We can’t see him or hear him, but he is with us. Touch the koosh ball now. That is our symbol for him. I have a koosh ball, and I give you this koosh ball, the one that I want you to touch.”You wonder all night about who the ball of Wings is and how he got his name. She says, “He is there with you all the time. Believe in him the way you have learned to believe in me. He sent me. Rest now. Because of your time of fears that causes you to need help with relaxing, I, Peace Full rub warm lotion into your arms and legs. Here is the lotion. Feel how good it is. It has some of the pure water from the lake in it.I watch over you when you sleep, and if you are thirsty or have a nightmare call my name. When you wake up, I am with you. I put a water bottle by your bed, but if you forget in the night to reach out for it, call my name. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

Just accept the state you are in, and continue to focus your mind on the word you will be repeating.Breathe in…peaceBreathe out…FullIn…peaceOut…FullPeace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Continue to repeat this word in your mind, focusing your attention on this word whenever your thoughts wander.Keep repeating your focus word…(pause)When your thoughts drift, focus your attention again on your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Focus your mind again on your focus word.As thoughts enter your mind, as they will, just turn your attention back to your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Take note of how your body feels, now. See how relaxed your muscles are. Notice how calm your mind is. Enjoy this feeling of relaxation for a few moments more.8. The Wavy Lake and the castle made of clouds:(lake sound)Then Peace Full squeezes your hand to let you know there’s no more water pencil with the needle. She says, “Listen, Ball of Wings has opened a door for us. We cross some more water. What do you say?” You are very happy and say, “Oh goody.”Peace Full says, “The lake is created for those who cannot see so they can hear the water and know the entrance to the castle made of clouds. You can breathe, swim, walk, and fly in here. The waves are here to comfort you and you feel them like you felt the bubbles of the stream the last time we were in the water. If you can see you go up floating on clouds, but you can’t hear clouds so this entrance is created for you.”Having been given the protective magic water you and Peace Full jump into the lake. On the way to the castle in the clouds as you and Peace Full fly threw the water, you ask “Why are the water places are so big?” For you to get to know the peaceful person and to know that the water is safe and that the water is far away from the place where you heard the words that took away your self esteem. You are tired from the water journey and the giving of the magic water and you want to sleep so you sleep in a castle.Peace Full knows a lot of old chant songs. She sings one to you while in the water which leads into the castle of clouds. Then she leads you to a comfortable room made out of clouds, and she gives you a tall glass of water. This room is the music room, and here she shows you with a keyboard and the music notes from middle c to G that the counting from the beginning of the story is the scale c to g and then back to c.Since she does a lot of lessons because she helps people get to the castle made of clouds, Peace Full says the counting instructions for sleep to you as you lie in the cloud bed that she knows is provided for you here in the cozy castle. You say, “who is the Ball of Wings? She says, “We can’t see him or hear him, but he is with us. Touch the koosh ball now. That is our symbol for him. I have a koosh ball, and I give you this koosh ball, the one that I want you to touch.”You wonder all night about who the ball of Wings is and how he got his name. She says, “He is there with you all the time. Believe in him the way you have learned to believe in me. He sent me. Rest now. Because of your time of fears that causes you to need help with relaxing, I, Peace Full rub warm lotion into your arms and legs. Here is the lotion. Feel how good it is. It has some of the pure water from the lake in it.I watch over you when you sleep, and if you are thirsty or have a nightmare call my name. When you wake up, I am with you. I put a water bottle by your bed, but if you forget in the night to reach out for it, call my name. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

Three times I squeeze your hand to let you know I’m giving you the hurry water. We touch the fountain each time. When you feel the pencil tube that lies flat against your wrist I will help you think of other things other than bad things that happened when Chaucer was alive. I will sing the old chant songs to you.”With great difficulty you say yes and then you cry. Peace Full says, “We have a relaxing time. You just listen while I talk, and I help you through the scary times. Remember, the cream does not let you feel any needle. If there is a time when there is a needle and no cream, as there may be in the real world, know that I will talk longer and my meditation will be double because then I will talk you through pain relief images. This story is about getting a pain relief cream because I saw a written note about the cream called Emla. I want you to know the first part of the double meditation. You do not need the second one now. You need only the meditation about my name.”7. Meditation on the main character’s name:Take a deep breath in…and out…In…and out…In…out…Continue to breathe slowly and rhythmically as you now meditate to calm your mind.You can choose any phrase you want to focus upon for the meditation portion of this pain management relaxation. This will be your focus word. I’ll use the word “peaceful” here. Focus your attention on this word with each breath. Every time your thoughts drift, focus in again on this word. Don’t worry about making anything happen, or doing this meditation a certain way. Whatever happens is right for you at this moment.Keep an attitude of passive acceptance. Just accept the state you are in, and continue to focus your mind on the word you will be repeating.Breathe in…peaceBreathe out…FullIn…peaceOut…FullPeace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Continue to repeat this word in your mind, focusing your attention on this word whenever your thoughts wander.Keep repeating your focus word…(pause)When your thoughts drift, focus your attention again on your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Focus your mind again on your focus word.As thoughts enter your mind, as they will, just turn your attention back to your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Take note of how your body feels, now. See how relaxed your muscles are. Notice how calm your mind is. Enjoy this feeling of relaxation for a few moments more.8. The Wavy Lake and the castle made of clouds:(lake sound)Then Peace Full squeezes your hand to let you know there’s no more water pencil with the needle. She says, “Listen, Ball of Wings has opened a door for us. We cross some more water. What do you say?” You are very happy and say, “Oh goody.”Peace Full says, “The lake is created for those who cannot see so they can hear the water and know the entrance to the castle made of clouds. You can breathe, swim, walk, and fly in here. The waves are here to comfort you and you feel them like you felt the bubbles of the stream the last time we were in the water. If you can see you go up floating on clouds, but you can’t hear clouds so this entrance is created for you.”Having been given the protective magic water you and Peace Full jump into the lake. On the way to the castle in the clouds as you and Peace Full fly threw the water, you ask “Why are the water places are so big?” For you to get to know the peaceful person and to know that the water is safe and that the water is far away from the place where you heard the words that took away your self esteem. You are tired from the water journey and the giving of the magic water and you want to sleep so you sleep in a castle.Peace Full knows a lot of old chant songs. She sings one to you while in the water which leads into the castle of clouds. Then she leads you to a comfortable room made out of clouds, and she gives you a tall glass of water. This room is the music room, and here she shows you with a keyboard and the music notes from middle c to G that the counting from the beginning of the story is the scale c to g and then back to c.Since she does a lot of lessons because she helps people get to the castle made of clouds, Peace Full says the counting instructions for sleep to you as you lie in the cloud bed that she knows is provided for you here in the cozy castle. You say, “who is the Ball of Wings? She says, “We can’t see him or hear him, but he is with us. Touch the koosh ball now. That is our symbol for him. I have a koosh ball, and I give you this koosh ball, the one that I want you to touch.”You wonder all night about who the ball of Wings is and how he got his name. She says, “He is there with you all the time. Believe in him the way you have learned to believe in me. He sent me. Rest now. Because of your time of fears that causes you to need help with relaxing, I, Peace Full rub warm lotion into your arms and legs. Here is the lotion. Feel how good it is. It has some of the pure water from the lake in it.I watch over you when you sleep, and if you are thirsty or have a nightmare call my name. When you wake up, I am with you. I put a water bottle by your bed, but if you forget in the night to reach out for it, call my name. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home
