Just accept the state you are in, and continue to focus your mind on the word you will be repeating.Breathe in…peaceBreathe out…FullIn…peaceOut…FullPeace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Continue to repeat this word in your mind, focusing your attention on this word whenever your thoughts wander.Keep repeating your focus word…(pause)When your thoughts drift, focus your attention again on your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Focus your mind again on your focus word.As thoughts enter your mind, as they will, just turn your attention back to your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Take note of how your body feels, now. See how relaxed your muscles are. Notice how calm your mind is. Enjoy this feeling of relaxation for a few moments more.8. The Wavy Lake and the castle made of clouds:(lake sound)Then Peace Full squeezes your hand to let you know there’s no more water pencil with the needle. She says, “Listen, Ball of Wings has opened a door for us. We cross some more water. What do you say?” You are very happy and say, “Oh goody.”Peace Full says, “The lake is created for those who cannot see so they can hear the water and know the entrance to the castle made of clouds. You can breathe, swim, walk, and fly in here. The waves are here to comfort you and you feel them like you felt the bubbles of the stream the last time we were in the water. If you can see you go up floating on clouds, but you can’t hear clouds so this entrance is created for you.”Having been given the protective magic water you and Peace Full jump into the lake. On the way to the castle in the clouds as you and Peace Full fly threw the water, you ask “Why are the water places are so big?” For you to get to know the peaceful person and to know that the water is safe and that the water is far away from the place where you heard the words that took away your self esteem. You are tired from the water journey and the giving of the magic water and you want to sleep so you sleep in a castle.Peace Full knows a lot of old chant songs. She sings one to you while in the water which leads into the castle of clouds. Then she leads you to a comfortable room made out of clouds, and she gives you a tall glass of water. This room is the music room, and here she shows you with a keyboard and the music notes from middle c to G that the counting from the beginning of the story is the scale c to g and then back to c.Since she does a lot of lessons because she helps people get to the castle made of clouds, Peace Full says the counting instructions for sleep to you as you lie in the cloud bed that she knows is provided for you here in the cozy castle. You say, “who is the Ball of Wings? She says, “We can’t see him or hear him, but he is with us. Touch the koosh ball now. That is our symbol for him. I have a koosh ball, and I give you this koosh ball, the one that I want you to touch.”You wonder all night about who the ball of Wings is and how he got his name. She says, “He is there with you all the time. Believe in him the way you have learned to believe in me. He sent me. Rest now. Because of your time of fears that causes you to need help with relaxing, I, Peace Full rub warm lotion into your arms and legs. Here is the lotion. Feel how good it is. It has some of the pure water from the lake in it.I watch over you when you sleep, and if you are thirsty or have a nightmare call my name. When you wake up, I am with you. I put a water bottle by your bed, but if you forget in the night to reach out for it, call my name. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

You say, “who is the Ball of Wings? She says, “We can’t see him or hear him, but he is with us. Touch the koosh ball now. That is our symbol for him. I have a koosh ball, and I give you this koosh ball, the one that I want you to touch.”You wonder all night about who the ball of Wings is and how he got his name. She says, “He is there with you all the time. Believe in him the way you have learned to believe in me. He sent me. Rest now. Because of your time of fears that causes you to need help with relaxing, I, Peace Full rub warm lotion into your arms and legs. Here is the lotion. Feel how good it is. It has some of the pure water from the lake in it.I watch over you when you sleep, and if you are thirsty or have a nightmare call my name. When you wake up, I am with you. I put a water bottle by your bed, but if you forget in the night to reach out for it, call my name. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

You can choose any phrase you want to focus upon for the meditation portion of this pain management relaxation. This will be your focus word. I’ll use the word “peaceful” here. Focus your attention on this word with each breath. Every time your thoughts drift, focus in again on this word. Don’t worry about making anything happen, or doing this meditation a certain way. Whatever happens is right for you at this moment.Keep an attitude of passive acceptance. Just accept the state you are in, and continue to focus your mind on the word you will be repeating.Breathe in…peaceBreathe out…FullIn…peaceOut…FullPeace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Continue to repeat this word in your mind, focusing your attention on this word whenever your thoughts wander.Keep repeating your focus word…(pause)When your thoughts drift, focus your attention again on your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Focus your mind again on your focus word.As thoughts enter your mind, as they will, just turn your attention back to your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Take note of how your body feels, now. See how relaxed your muscles are. Notice how calm your mind is. Enjoy this feeling of relaxation for a few moments more.8. The Wavy Lake and the castle made of clouds:(lake sound)Then Peace Full squeezes your hand to let you know there’s no more water pencil with the needle. She says, “Listen, Ball of Wings has opened a door for us. We cross some more water. What do you say?” You are very happy and say, “Oh goody.”Peace Full says, “The lake is created for those who cannot see so they can hear the water and know the entrance to the castle made of clouds. You can breathe, swim, walk, and fly in here. The waves are here to comfort you and you feel them like you felt the bubbles of the stream the last time we were in the water. If you can see you go up floating on clouds, but you can’t hear clouds so this entrance is created for you.”Having been given the protective magic water you and Peace Full jump into the lake. On the way to the castle in the clouds as you and Peace Full fly threw the water, you ask “Why are the water places are so big?” For you to get to know the peaceful person and to know that the water is safe and that the water is far away from the place where you heard the words that took away your self esteem. You are tired from the water journey and the giving of the magic water and you want to sleep so you sleep in a castle.Peace Full knows a lot of old chant songs. She sings one to you while in the water which leads into the castle of clouds. Then she leads you to a comfortable room made out of clouds, and she gives you a tall glass of water. This room is the music room, and here she shows you with a keyboard and the music notes from middle c to G that the counting from the beginning of the story is the scale c to g and then back to c.Since she does a lot of lessons because she helps people get to the castle made of clouds, Peace Full says the counting instructions for sleep to you as you lie in the cloud bed that she knows is provided for you here in the cozy castle. You say, “who is the Ball of Wings? She says, “We can’t see him or hear him, but he is with us. Touch the koosh ball now. That is our symbol for him. I have a koosh ball, and I give you this koosh ball, the one that I want you to touch.”You wonder all night about who the ball of Wings is and how he got his name. She says, “He is there with you all the time. Believe in him the way you have learned to believe in me. He sent me. Rest now. Because of your time of fears that causes you to need help with relaxing, I, Peace Full rub warm lotion into your arms and legs. Here is the lotion. Feel how good it is. It has some of the pure water from the lake in it.I watch over you when you sleep, and if you are thirsty or have a nightmare call my name. When you wake up, I am with you. I put a water bottle by your bed, but if you forget in the night to reach out for it, call my name. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

I put a water bottle by your bed, but if you forget in the night to reach out for it, call my name. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

In…peaceOut…FullPeace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Continue to repeat this word in your mind, focusing your attention on this word whenever your thoughts wander.Keep repeating your focus word…(pause)When your thoughts drift, focus your attention again on your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Focus your mind again on your focus word.As thoughts enter your mind, as they will, just turn your attention back to your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Take note of how your body feels, now. See how relaxed your muscles are. Notice how calm your mind is. Enjoy this feeling of relaxation for a few moments more.8. The Wavy Lake and the castle made of clouds:(lake sound)Then Peace Full squeezes your hand to let you know there’s no more water pencil with the needle. She says, “Listen, Ball of Wings has opened a door for us. We cross some more water. What do you say?” You are very happy and say, “Oh goody.”Peace Full says, “The lake is created for those who cannot see so they can hear the water and know the entrance to the castle made of clouds. You can breathe, swim, walk, and fly in here. The waves are here to comfort you and you feel them like you felt the bubbles of the stream the last time we were in the water. If you can see you go up floating on clouds, but you can’t hear clouds so this entrance is created for you.”Having been given the protective magic water you and Peace Full jump into the lake. On the way to the castle in the clouds as you and Peace Full fly threw the water, you ask “Why are the water places are so big?” For you to get to know the peaceful person and to know that the water is safe and that the water is far away from the place where you heard the words that took away your self esteem. You are tired from the water journey and the giving of the magic water and you want to sleep so you sleep in a castle.Peace Full knows a lot of old chant songs. She sings one to you while in the water which leads into the castle of clouds. Then she leads you to a comfortable room made out of clouds, and she gives you a tall glass of water. This room is the music room, and here she shows you with a keyboard and the music notes from middle c to G that the counting from the beginning of the story is the scale c to g and then back to c.Since she does a lot of lessons because she helps people get to the castle made of clouds, Peace Full says the counting instructions for sleep to you as you lie in the cloud bed that she knows is provided for you here in the cozy castle. You say, “who is the Ball of Wings? She says, “We can’t see him or hear him, but he is with us. Touch the koosh ball now. That is our symbol for him. I have a koosh ball, and I give you this koosh ball, the one that I want you to touch.”You wonder all night about who the ball of Wings is and how he got his name. She says, “He is there with you all the time. Believe in him the way you have learned to believe in me. He sent me. Rest now. Because of your time of fears that causes you to need help with relaxing, I, Peace Full rub warm lotion into your arms and legs. Here is the lotion. Feel how good it is. It has some of the pure water from the lake in it.I watch over you when you sleep, and if you are thirsty or have a nightmare call my name. When you wake up, I am with you. I put a water bottle by your bed, but if you forget in the night to reach out for it, call my name. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

What do you say?” You are very happy and say, “Oh goody.”Peace Full says, “The lake is created for those who cannot see so they can hear the water and know the entrance to the castle made of clouds. You can breathe, swim, walk, and fly in here. The waves are here to comfort you and you feel them like you felt the bubbles of the stream the last time we were in the water. If you can see you go up floating on clouds, but you can’t hear clouds so this entrance is created for you.”Having been given the protective magic water you and Peace Full jump into the lake. On the way to the castle in the clouds as you and Peace Full fly threw the water, you ask “Why are the water places are so big?” For you to get to know the peaceful person and to know that the water is safe and that the water is far away from the place where you heard the words that took away your self esteem. You are tired from the water journey and the giving of the magic water and you want to sleep so you sleep in a castle.Peace Full knows a lot of old chant songs. She sings one to you while in the water which leads into the castle of clouds. Then she leads you to a comfortable room made out of clouds, and she gives you a tall glass of water. This room is the music room, and here she shows you with a keyboard and the music notes from middle c to G that the counting from the beginning of the story is the scale c to g and then back to c.Since she does a lot of lessons because she helps people get to the castle made of clouds, Peace Full says the counting instructions for sleep to you as you lie in the cloud bed that she knows is provided for you here in the cozy castle. You say, “who is the Ball of Wings? She says, “We can’t see him or hear him, but he is with us. Touch the koosh ball now. That is our symbol for him. I have a koosh ball, and I give you this koosh ball, the one that I want you to touch.”You wonder all night about who the ball of Wings is and how he got his name. She says, “He is there with you all the time. Believe in him the way you have learned to believe in me. He sent me. Rest now. Because of your time of fears that causes you to need help with relaxing, I, Peace Full rub warm lotion into your arms and legs. Here is the lotion. Feel how good it is. It has some of the pure water from the lake in it.I watch over you when you sleep, and if you are thirsty or have a nightmare call my name. When you wake up, I am with you. I put a water bottle by your bed, but if you forget in the night to reach out for it, call my name. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Continue to repeat this word in your mind, focusing your attention on this word whenever your thoughts wander.Keep repeating your focus word…(pause)When your thoughts drift, focus your attention again on your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Focus your mind again on your focus word.As thoughts enter your mind, as they will, just turn your attention back to your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Take note of how your body feels, now. See how relaxed your muscles are. Notice how calm your mind is. Enjoy this feeling of relaxation for a few moments more.8. The Wavy Lake and the castle made of clouds:(lake sound)Then Peace Full squeezes your hand to let you know there’s no more water pencil with the needle. She says, “Listen, Ball of Wings has opened a door for us. We cross some more water. What do you say?” You are very happy and say, “Oh goody.”Peace Full says, “The lake is created for those who cannot see so they can hear the water and know the entrance to the castle made of clouds. You can breathe, swim, walk, and fly in here. The waves are here to comfort you and you feel them like you felt the bubbles of the stream the last time we were in the water. If you can see you go up floating on clouds, but you can’t hear clouds so this entrance is created for you.”Having been given the protective magic water you and Peace Full jump into the lake. On the way to the castle in the clouds as you and Peace Full fly threw the water, you ask “Why are the water places are so big?” For you to get to know the peaceful person and to know that the water is safe and that the water is far away from the place where you heard the words that took away your self esteem. You are tired from the water journey and the giving of the magic water and you want to sleep so you sleep in a castle.Peace Full knows a lot of old chant songs. She sings one to you while in the water which leads into the castle of clouds. Then she leads you to a comfortable room made out of clouds, and she gives you a tall glass of water. This room is the music room, and here she shows you with a keyboard and the music notes from middle c to G that the counting from the beginning of the story is the scale c to g and then back to c.Since she does a lot of lessons because she helps people get to the castle made of clouds, Peace Full says the counting instructions for sleep to you as you lie in the cloud bed that she knows is provided for you here in the cozy castle. You say, “who is the Ball of Wings? She says, “We can’t see him or hear him, but he is with us. Touch the koosh ball now. That is our symbol for him. I have a koosh ball, and I give you this koosh ball, the one that I want you to touch.”You wonder all night about who the ball of Wings is and how he got his name. She says, “He is there with you all the time. Believe in him the way you have learned to believe in me. He sent me. Rest now. Because of your time of fears that causes you to need help with relaxing, I, Peace Full rub warm lotion into your arms and legs. Here is the lotion. Feel how good it is. It has some of the pure water from the lake in it.I watch over you when you sleep, and if you are thirsty or have a nightmare call my name. When you wake up, I am with you. I put a water bottle by your bed, but if you forget in the night to reach out for it, call my name. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

(pause)When your thoughts drift, focus your attention again on your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Focus your mind again on your focus word.As thoughts enter your mind, as they will, just turn your attention back to your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Take note of how your body feels, now. See how relaxed your muscles are. Notice how calm your mind is. Enjoy this feeling of relaxation for a few moments more.8. The Wavy Lake and the castle made of clouds:(lake sound)Then Peace Full squeezes your hand to let you know there’s no more water pencil with the needle. She says, “Listen, Ball of Wings has opened a door for us. We cross some more water. What do you say?” You are very happy and say, “Oh goody.”Peace Full says, “The lake is created for those who cannot see so they can hear the water and know the entrance to the castle made of clouds. You can breathe, swim, walk, and fly in here. The waves are here to comfort you and you feel them like you felt the bubbles of the stream the last time we were in the water. If you can see you go up floating on clouds, but you can’t hear clouds so this entrance is created for you.”Having been given the protective magic water you and Peace Full jump into the lake. On the way to the castle in the clouds as you and Peace Full fly threw the water, you ask “Why are the water places are so big?” For you to get to know the peaceful person and to know that the water is safe and that the water is far away from the place where you heard the words that took away your self esteem. You are tired from the water journey and the giving of the magic water and you want to sleep so you sleep in a castle.Peace Full knows a lot of old chant songs. She sings one to you while in the water which leads into the castle of clouds. Then she leads you to a comfortable room made out of clouds, and she gives you a tall glass of water. This room is the music room, and here she shows you with a keyboard and the music notes from middle c to G that the counting from the beginning of the story is the scale c to g and then back to c.Since she does a lot of lessons because she helps people get to the castle made of clouds, Peace Full says the counting instructions for sleep to you as you lie in the cloud bed that she knows is provided for you here in the cozy castle. You say, “who is the Ball of Wings? She says, “We can’t see him or hear him, but he is with us. Touch the koosh ball now. That is our symbol for him. I have a koosh ball, and I give you this koosh ball, the one that I want you to touch.”You wonder all night about who the ball of Wings is and how he got his name. She says, “He is there with you all the time. Believe in him the way you have learned to believe in me. He sent me. Rest now. Because of your time of fears that causes you to need help with relaxing, I, Peace Full rub warm lotion into your arms and legs. Here is the lotion. Feel how good it is. It has some of the pure water from the lake in it.I watch over you when you sleep, and if you are thirsty or have a nightmare call my name. When you wake up, I am with you. I put a water bottle by your bed, but if you forget in the night to reach out for it, call my name. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

She says, “He is there with you all the time. Believe in him the way you have learned to believe in me. He sent me. Rest now. Because of your time of fears that causes you to need help with relaxing, I, Peace Full rub warm lotion into your arms and legs. Here is the lotion. Feel how good it is. It has some of the pure water from the lake in it.I watch over you when you sleep, and if you are thirsty or have a nightmare call my name. When you wake up, I am with you. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

Focus your mind again on your focus word.As thoughts enter your mind, as they will, just turn your attention back to your focus word.Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Take note of how your body feels, now. See how relaxed your muscles are. Notice how calm your mind is. Enjoy this feeling of relaxation for a few moments more.8. The Wavy Lake and the castle made of clouds:(lake sound)Then Peace Full squeezes your hand to let you know there’s no more water pencil with the needle. She says, “Listen, Ball of Wings has opened a door for us. We cross some more water. What do you say?” You are very happy and say, “Oh goody.”Peace Full says, “The lake is created for those who cannot see so they can hear the water and know the entrance to the castle made of clouds. You can breathe, swim, walk, and fly in here. The waves are here to comfort you and you feel them like you felt the bubbles of the stream the last time we were in the water. If you can see you go up floating on clouds, but you can’t hear clouds so this entrance is created for you.”Having been given the protective magic water you and Peace Full jump into the lake. On the way to the castle in the clouds as you and Peace Full fly threw the water, you ask “Why are the water places are so big?” For you to get to know the peaceful person and to know that the water is safe and that the water is far away from the place where you heard the words that took away your self esteem. You are tired from the water journey and the giving of the magic water and you want to sleep so you sleep in a castle.Peace Full knows a lot of old chant songs. She sings one to you while in the water which leads into the castle of clouds. Then she leads you to a comfortable room made out of clouds, and she gives you a tall glass of water. This room is the music room, and here she shows you with a keyboard and the music notes from middle c to G that the counting from the beginning of the story is the scale c to g and then back to c.Since she does a lot of lessons because she helps people get to the castle made of clouds, Peace Full says the counting instructions for sleep to you as you lie in the cloud bed that she knows is provided for you here in the cozy castle. You say, “who is the Ball of Wings? She says, “We can’t see him or hear him, but he is with us. Touch the koosh ball now. That is our symbol for him. I have a koosh ball, and I give you this koosh ball, the one that I want you to touch.”You wonder all night about who the ball of Wings is and how he got his name. She says, “He is there with you all the time. Believe in him the way you have learned to believe in me. He sent me. Rest now. Because of your time of fears that causes you to need help with relaxing, I, Peace Full rub warm lotion into your arms and legs. Here is the lotion. Feel how good it is. It has some of the pure water from the lake in it.I watch over you when you sleep, and if you are thirsty or have a nightmare call my name. When you wake up, I am with you. I put a water bottle by your bed, but if you forget in the night to reach out for it, call my name. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

Peace…Full…Peace…Full…Take note of how your body feels, now. See how relaxed your muscles are. Notice how calm your mind is. Enjoy this feeling of relaxation for a few moments more.8. The Wavy Lake and the castle made of clouds:(lake sound)Then Peace Full squeezes your hand to let you know there’s no more water pencil with the needle. She says, “Listen, Ball of Wings has opened a door for us. We cross some more water. What do you say?” You are very happy and say, “Oh goody.”Peace Full says, “The lake is created for those who cannot see so they can hear the water and know the entrance to the castle made of clouds. You can breathe, swim, walk, and fly in here. The waves are here to comfort you and you feel them like you felt the bubbles of the stream the last time we were in the water. If you can see you go up floating on clouds, but you can’t hear clouds so this entrance is created for you.”Having been given the protective magic water you and Peace Full jump into the lake. On the way to the castle in the clouds as you and Peace Full fly threw the water, you ask “Why are the water places are so big?” For you to get to know the peaceful person and to know that the water is safe and that the water is far away from the place where you heard the words that took away your self esteem. You are tired from the water journey and the giving of the magic water and you want to sleep so you sleep in a castle.Peace Full knows a lot of old chant songs. She sings one to you while in the water which leads into the castle of clouds. Then she leads you to a comfortable room made out of clouds, and she gives you a tall glass of water. This room is the music room, and here she shows you with a keyboard and the music notes from middle c to G that the counting from the beginning of the story is the scale c to g and then back to c.Since she does a lot of lessons because she helps people get to the castle made of clouds, Peace Full says the counting instructions for sleep to you as you lie in the cloud bed that she knows is provided for you here in the cozy castle. You say, “who is the Ball of Wings? She says, “We can’t see him or hear him, but he is with us. Touch the koosh ball now. That is our symbol for him. I have a koosh ball, and I give you this koosh ball, the one that I want you to touch.”You wonder all night about who the ball of Wings is and how he got his name. She says, “He is there with you all the time. Believe in him the way you have learned to believe in me. He sent me. Rest now. Because of your time of fears that causes you to need help with relaxing, I, Peace Full rub warm lotion into your arms and legs. Here is the lotion. Feel how good it is. It has some of the pure water from the lake in it.I watch over you when you sleep, and if you are thirsty or have a nightmare call my name. When you wake up, I am with you. I put a water bottle by your bed, but if you forget in the night to reach out for it, call my name. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

You are tired from the water journey and the giving of the magic water and you want to sleep so you sleep in a castle.Peace Full knows a lot of old chant songs. She sings one to you while in the water which leads into the castle of clouds. Then she leads you to a comfortable room made out of clouds, and she gives you a tall glass of water. This room is the music room, and here she shows you with a keyboard and the music notes from middle c to G that the counting from the beginning of the story is the scale c to g and then back to c.Since she does a lot of lessons because she helps people get to the castle made of clouds, Peace Full says the counting instructions for sleep to you as you lie in the cloud bed that she knows is provided for you here in the cozy castle. You say, “who is the Ball of Wings? She says, “We can’t see him or hear him, but he is with us. Touch the koosh ball now. That is our symbol for him. I have a koosh ball, and I give you this koosh ball, the one that I want you to touch.”You wonder all night about who the ball of Wings is and how he got his name. She says, “He is there with you all the time. Believe in him the way you have learned to believe in me. He sent me. Rest now. Because of your time of fears that causes you to need help with relaxing, I, Peace Full rub warm lotion into your arms and legs. Here is the lotion. Feel how good it is. It has some of the pure water from the lake in it.I watch over you when you sleep, and if you are thirsty or have a nightmare call my name. When you wake up, I am with you. I put a water bottle by your bed, but if you forget in the night to reach out for it, call my name. Here is a koosh ball by your bed so you can remember who sent me.Take a deep breath in…and breathe out…In…and out…Continue to breathe deeply, slowly, and comfortably.I’ll count down now, from ten…to one. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home

Then Peace Full squeezes your hand to let you know there’s no more water pencil with the needle. She says, “Listen, Ball of Wings has opened a door for us. We cross some more water. What do you say?” You are very happy and say, “Oh goody.”Peace Full says, “The lake is created for those who cannot see so they can hear the water and know the entrance to the castle made of clouds. You can breathe, swim, walk, and fly in here. The waves are here to comfort you and you feel them like you felt the bubbles of the stream the last time we were in the water. If you can see you go up floating on clouds, but you can’t hear clouds so this entrance is created for you.”Having been given the protective magic water you and Peace Full jump into the lake. On the way to the castle in the clouds as you and Peace Full fly threw the water, you ask “Why are the water places are so big?” For you to get to know the peaceful person and to know that the water is safe and that the water is far away from the place where you heard the words that took away your self esteem. As I say each number, you can become more relaxed.Let’s begin.10…feeling your muscles start to relax…9…your hands and feet are warming and relaxing…8…your muscles are becoming loose and heavy…7…notice your attention drifting…becoming more relaxed…6…relaxing even further now…peaceful…5…a tingly feeling of relaxation spreading through your body…pleasant and relaxed4…further relaxed and peaceful…3…free of tension…2…almost completely relaxed now…1…you are now deeply relaxed.Very deeply relaxed and comfortable.Return from Water Meditation: Trusting the People Who Do Medical Procedures toRelaxation ScriptsBack toGuided Imagery ScriptsBack toInner Health Studio Home
